APPEARANCES: FOR PLAINTIFF AND FOR DEFENDANT. AFTER A CLOSED DOOR MEETING WITH COUNSELS & THE JUDGE, THE MATTER WAS CONTINUED TO SEPT. 29, 2004 AT 2:00PM. HON. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF HONG MY NGO, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION (TRANSFERRED FROM DEPT. 301 JUDGE WARREN RECUSED HIMSELF.) APPEARANCES: FOR PLAINTIFF AND FOR DEFENDANT. (EVIDENTIARY HEARING) PLAINTIFF-PETITIONER HONG MY NGO WAS CALLED TO WITNESS STAND WITH A CERTIFIED VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER MS. QUY K. DAO. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBIT "1" WRITTEN STATEMENTS FROM THE DEPT. OF CHILD SUPPORT SERVICES DATED 9-21-04 FOR IDENTIFICATION PURPOSES. MR. VAN HOANG NGUYEN AND SHUN FAI LUI WAS CALLED TO THE WITNESS STAND FOR RESPONDENTS. THE HEARING ON THIS MATTER EXCEEDED MORE THAN 1 HOUR, HENCE, $280. ASSESSED PER PARTY. THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER TO NOVEMBER 3, 2004 FOR MORE WITNESSES TO BE PRESENTED. MS. NGO SHALL CONTINUE HER TESTIMONY FOR THE NEXT HEARING RE TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER STATUS QUO SHOULD,SHALL REMAIN. THE COURT INCREASED TO $60 A DAY ( $ 10. INCREASE) SUSTENANCE TO BE PAID THE BY PLAINTIFF-PETITIONER TO THE DEFENDANT-RESPONDENT. HON. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF HONG MY NGO; ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION (EVIDENTIARY HEARING) (FROM 301 PER JUDGE WARREN RECUSAL. APPEARANCES: FOR PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. THE COURT ADVISED BOTH PARTIES TO CONFER FOR AN HOUR IN ORDER TO DISCUSS THE POSSIBILITY OF RESOLVING THE CONFLICT FOR THE GOOD OF THE BUSINESS. HENCE, THE COURT CALLED FOR A RECESS. UPON RESUMPTION OF HEARING, PARTIES INFORMED THE COURT, THAT THEY REACHED A SETTLEMENT. TERMS AND CONDITIONS WAS PUT IN RECORD IN OPEN COURT AND, THE WHOLE TERMS & CONDITIONS WILL BE MEMORIALIZED IN WRITING WITHIN A WEEK , WHICH WILL BE APPROVED BY THE COURT. EACH COUNSEL TO REMIT $280.OO FOR HEARING EXCEEDING ONE HOUR, FOR COURT'S REPORTER PER DIEM. JUDGE RONALD QUIDACHAY; REPORTER BELDON YEE #2647
